title: IonQ Backend
description: An IonQ quantum backend (simulator or trapped-ion QPU) exposed via the Quantum Cloud API.

status.description: Current operational state of the backend.

qubits.description: Number of qubits available on the backend.

average_queue_time.description: Current average wait time in seconds before a submitted job begins running.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status update.

degraded.description: True when backend performance is reduced compared to its normal calibration.

characterization_id.description: Identifier of the currently active characterization for the backend.

location.description: Physical location where the backend is hosted.

kw.description: Current power draw of the backend in kilowatts.
